name: Yext, Inc.
description: Yext is an enterprise agentic marketing platform that helps brands manage their digital presence and visibility across AI models, search engines, social media, and review sites. By utilizing a centralized Knowledge Graph, the company provides a verified source of truth that ensures accurate brand information is delivered wherever customers search. Yext's infrastructure enables businesses to monitor competitive intelligence, optimize local listings, and syndicate content in real-time, allowing global brands to maintain control over their digital identity and improve discoverability in an increasingly AI-driven landscape.
